displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• For Soup Noodle:
1. Put Megah Mee into boiled soup and add your favourite ingredients eg. chicken meat, prawns, egg or vegetables etc
2. Simmer for 2 minutes and serve immediately
• For Fried Noodle:
1. Put Megah Mee into boiling water until loosen
2. Drain away water
3. Heat cooking oil in wok and Megah Mee, fry for a few minutes
4. Add seasoning and ingredients eg. chicken meat, prawns, egg or vegetables etc.
5. Serve hot

displayMetadata.value:

• May contain wheat and gluten

metaData.Key Information: Myojo Instant Noodles feature authentic local flavours satisfying cravings for generations. Myojo first launch in the Singapore market more than 40 years ago and continues to be the best seller today. Some of the uniquely available unique flavours include Thai Tom Yam, Chicken Abalone, Korean Kimchi, Curry Chicken, Shrimp Tanmen, Chilli Crab, Prawn Noodles, Char Mee and Mee Poh. One can now enjoy hawker fares at the comforts of their own home. What’s more, this range is Halal certified to cater to all. So now everyone can enjoy Myojo! What are you waiting for? Try them all today!

metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• Cooking Method (1):
1. Wash the bean mee with cold water but do not soak it
2. Cook the bean mee with the prepared soup for 4 - 5 minutes
• Cooking Method (2):
1. Wash the bean mee and cook with boiling water for 4 - 5 minutes
2. Drain dry and fry with the prepared ingredients
• Cooking Method (3):
1. Immerse in boiling oil until it turns brownish
2. Drain dry, and mix in the prepared ingredients

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodles: Wheat Flour (63%), Palm Oil [Antioxidants (306, 320, 321)], Tapioca Starch, Salt, Acidity Regulators (450, 500, 451, 501), Colour (160A), Stabilisers (412, 414), Emulsifier (471)
• Seasoning Powder: Salt, Flavouring Powder [Imitation Chicken Flavour, Yeast Extract, Soya Sauce Powder (Soya, Wheat, Salt), Acidity Regulators (296, 327)], Flavour Enhancers (621, 635), Sugar, Spices, Chilli, Corn Starch, Vegetables Powder (Celery, Cabbage), Hydrolysed Plant Protein [Soya, Stabiliser (1400)], Creamer [Glucose, Palm Fat, Sodium Caseinate, Stabiliser (340), Emulsifier (340), Emulsifier (471)], Colour (150C), Anticaking Agent (551)
• Seasoning Oil: Palm Oil, Onion)
• Garnish: Cabbage (contains Lactose), Carrot, Fishcake [Fish, Corn Starch, Sugar, Colours (160B, 120), Stabilisers (414, 420)], Chilli, Spring Onion
• Contain: Wheat, fish, soya and milk
metaData.Preparation:
1. Open lid halfway
2. Add seasoning powder and garnish
3. Pour boiling water to inner line and close lid for 3 minutes
4. Remove lid, stir well and serve
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
Cook noodle in rapid boiling water for 4 minutes (salt or oil is not needed)
• For Stir-Fry:
1. Cook noodle in rapid boiling water for 3 minutes (noodles will receive extra cooking in the wok)
2. Drain, then rinse well with cold water
Drain again
• To Reheat:
Briefly submerge in hot water

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodle: Wheat Flour, Palm Olein (contains permitted antioxidant: BHA), Salt, Guar Gum, Sodium Polyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Carbonate
• Seasoning Powder: Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Shrimp Powder, Garlic, White Pepper, Black Pepper
• Seasoning Oil: Palm Olein (contains permitted antioxidant: BHA), Shallot, Paprika Oleoresin
• Seafood Sauce: Soybean, Sugar, Salt, Flour Brown Sugar, Caramel, Monosodium Glutamate, Benozoic Acid, Shrimp Powder
• Vegetable Pack: Fried Shallot
• Contains: wheat, soybeans and crustacea

metaData.Preparation:
• For cooking:
Cook organic udon in rapid boiling water for 10 minutes (salt or oil is not needed)
• For stir-fry:
1. Cook orgainic udon in rapid boiling water for 8 minutes (noodles will receive extra cooking in the wok)
2. Drain and rinse well with cold water
3. Drain again

4. Then serve in your favourite recipe
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place

product.description: Treat yourselves to the light and healthy taste of Koka noodles.

metaData.Key Information:
• Cooked through a fully-automatic, steaming and air-drying process
• Suitable for vegetarians
• Cholesterol-free
• No preservatives and colouring
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water for 2 - 3 minutes
2. Rinse cooked noodles thoroughly in clear cold water for dry or cold dishes
3. Drain immediately
4. Serve with your favourite recipe
